format.raw: fw1-loggrabber=15008 loc=3708414 time=2022-02-12_040052 action=drop orig=172.24.254.45 ifdir=inbound ifname=eth1-02 hasaccounting=0 logId=0 logtype=connection logsequencenum=54 isfirstforluuid=131072 logversion=5 originsicname=CN=iNetFWCH590002,O=FWMGTCHNGSM410..2ir8z6 uuid=00000000,00000000,00000000,00000000 product=VPN-1_&_FireWall-1 policyidtag=product=VPN-1_&_FireWall-1 inzone=Internal outzone=External serviceid=anyUDP src=192.168.151.51 sport=38072 dst=104.199.156.58 service=10240 proto=udp matchid=110

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="1,30" arr_length="38">
    <Field position="0"  name="location"        convert_tag="[[@regexGet('.*')]]" />
    <Field position="1"  name="eqp_dt"           convert_tag="[[@date('yyyy-MM-dd_HHmmss','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="2"  name="action" />
    <Field position="3"  name="original_ip"     org_name="orig" />
    <Field position="4"  name="ifdir" />
    <Field position="5"  name="ifname" />
    <Field position="6"  name="has_accounting"  org_name="hasaccounting" />
    <Field position="7"  name="logid" />
    <Field position="8"  name="traffic_type"    org_name="logtype" />
    <Field position="9"  name="log_seq_num"     org_name="logsequencenum" />
    <Field position="10" name="is_first_for_luuid" org_name="isfirstforluuid" />
    <Field position="11" name="version"         org_name="logversion" />
    <Field position="12" name="eqp_nm"          org_name="originsicname" />
    <Field position="13" name="uuid" />
    <Field position="14" name="product" />
    <Field position="15" name="policy_id_tag"   org_name="policyidtag" />
    <Field position="16" name="in_zone"          org_name="inzone" />
    <Field position="17" name="out_zone"         org_name="outzone" />
    <Field position="18" name="service_id"      org_name="serviceid" />
    <Field position="19" name="src_ip"           org_name="src" />
    <Field position="20" name="src_port"         org_name="sport" />
    <Field position="21" name="dstn_ip"          org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="22" name="service" />
    <Field position="23" name="prtc"             org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="24" name="match_id"        org_name="matchid" />
    <Field position="25" name="match_table_id"  org_name="matchtableid" />
    <Field position="26" name="layer_uuid"      org_name="layeruuid" />
    <Field position="27" name="match_table_layer_uuid" org_name="matchtablelayeruuid" />
    <Field position="28" name="layer_nm"        org_name="layername" />
    <Field position="29" name="match_table_layer_nm" org_name="matchtablelayername" />
    <Field position="30" name="rule_uid"        org_name="ruleuid" />
    <Field position="31" name="match_table_rule_uid" org_name="matchtableruleuid" />
    <Field position="32" name="rule_nm"         org_name="rulename" />
    <Field position="33" name="match_table_rule_nm" org_name="matchtablerulename" />
    <Field position="34" name="rule_action"     org_name="ruleaction" />
    <Field position="35" name="match_table_rule_action" org_name="matchtableruleaction" />
    <Field position="36" name="parent_rule"     org_name="parentrule" />
    <Field position="37" name="match_table_parent_rule" org_name="matchtableparentrule" />
    <Field position="38" name="vendor"           convert_tag="[[@set('checkpoint')]]" />
    <Field position="39" name="model"            convert_tag="[[@set('quantum')]]" />
    <Field position="40" name="logtype"          convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="41" name="parser_version"   convert_tag="[[@set('v4')]]" />
    <Field position="42" name="eqp_type"         convert_tag="[[@set('gw')]]" />
    <Field position="43" name="parser_info"      convert_tag="[[@set('[CheckPoint]_quantum_traffic_v4_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="44" name="original_log"     convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
